name: fine-tunes registry add operation appends to the existing entries without truncating
command: mkdir -p prompts && printf 'fine_tunes:\n  - {artifact_id: ft-1, base_model: sonnet, training_data: ds-1, license: MIT}\n' > prompts/fine-tunes.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/fine-tunes-add.sh" --registry prompts/fine-tunes.yaml --artifact-id ft-2 --base-model opus --training-data ds-2 --license MIT 2>err.txt && grep -q 'ft-1' prompts/fine-tunes.yaml && grep -q 'ft-2' prompts/fine-tunes.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
